Lorea & Amy's Recipes
  • List

Challah French Toast Casserole

Want to hear the creator's life story? Click here.
Preparation time 20m
Cook time 50m
Ingredients
  • 1 lb Challah bread loaf
  • 6 large eggs
  • 2 Cup whole milk
  • 2/4 Cup heavy cream
  • 1/4 Cup sugar
  • 1/2 Cup brown sugar
  • 1/2 tsp kosher salt
  • 1 Tbsp vanilla
  • 1/2 tsp nutmeg
  • 2 tsp cinnamon
  • 1/2 Cup flour
  • 1/2 Cup cold butter
  • 1/2 Cup brown sugar
  • 2 tsp cinnamon
  • 1/2 tsp salt
Instructions
  1. Cut or tear the bread into bite-sized pieces and leave out for 1-2 hours to dry.
  2. Add bread to a 9 x 13 baking pan sprayed with non-stick spray.
  3. In a large mixing bowl, whisk together remaining casserole ingredients and pour evenly over the bread.
  4. Cover pan with foil and leave in the refrigerator at least 2 hours, or overnight.
  5. Before baking, preheat oven to 350°. Mix together topping ingredients in mixing bowl and use pastry cutter or fingers to incorporate butter with dry ingredients until it resembles coarse crumbs.
  6. Remove the casserole from the refrigertor and sprinkle topping evenly over the top.
  7. Return foil over the casserole and bake for 25 minutes. After 25 minutes, remove the foil and bake for another 20-25 minutes.
